text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During training, Grass Wonder seems to be
suffering from the heat.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I can manage. Just give me a moment to
cool off, and I should be back on my feet in no
time.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry to have forced this pause on our training
session.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I wish my body would adapt to summer better.
choice_data_list: Not a fan of the heat?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I suppose not. Cold weather doesn't bother me,
but sweltering heat like this is a different matter...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: If only there were a good way to overcome it...
choice_data_list: If you clear your mind, even fire will feel cool!
There are traditional ways to beat the heat!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: That's... a Japanese saying, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: If I cool my thoughts, the heat can't bother me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I see. This type of mentality might be what I need
right now.
choice_data_list: Let's see whose focus can outlast the other's!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Is that a challenge? You know I can't back
down from that, right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Very well, Trainer. I accept, and I won't lose. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's session was a bit rough on her, but it
seems like Grass Wonder has gotten the hang of
dealing with hot weather.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That's true. Off the top of my head, there are
hand fans, wind chimes, watermelons... Or
perhaps a splash of water.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Eheh—you know, I feel cooler already just saying
those words. So... which do you think we should
try, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
However... so am I. ♪ Let's make preparations at
once.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
A quest to beat the heat together... Hehe, I can
hardly wait. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's session was a bit rough on her, but it
seems like Grass Wonder has learned how to
enjoy hot weather.
